note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Surgical Abdominal wall measures aprx 4.4 x 2.6cm, depth 1.4cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R ankle 2.6x1.6, 0.7cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 4.4 cm x 2.6 cm x 1.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 26% slough, 74% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Debridement consult ordered.
